summary:
Bug identified: incorrect pagination offset calculation. Fixed and verified using the test script. Done.

I have fixed the off-by-one pagination bug in `app/app.py`. The offset calculation was incorrectly subtracting 1 for pages after the first, leading to duplicated and skipped items at page boundaries.

```python
    # Corrected offset calculation
    offset = (page - 1) * per_page
```

I verified the fix by running `./test.sh`, which now passes.
